ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the item */,
  "rarity_id" INTEGER /* Rarity of the item */,
  "power" TEXT /* Power level of the item */,
  "attune" INTEGER /* Whether the item can be attuned to a player character */,
  "use" TEXT /* Usage restrictions or limitations of the item */,
  "curse" TEXT /* Curse associated with the item, if any */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Source of the item */,
  "page" TEXT /* Page number of the item in the source material */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the item */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the item */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the item */,
  "craft_time" INTEGER /* Time required to craft the item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for an image of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_rarity_id FOREIGN KEY ("rarity_id") REFERENCES rarity ("rarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL for an icon of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL for an icon of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rarity" (
  "rarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rarity level */,
  "rarity_name" TEXT /* Name of the rarity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rarity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rarity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "base_price" REAL /* Base price of the material */,
  "weight_per_unit" REAL /* Weight of the material per unit */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the material */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Source of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being crafted */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used in the recipe */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material required */,
  "craft_time" INTEGER /* Time required to craft the item */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the recipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being priced */,
  "material_cost" REAL /* Material cost of the item */,
  "labor_cost" REAL /* Labor cost of the item */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the item */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the price was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game master who created the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the campaign */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for an image of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
